[PROJECTS]
StrivePrediction Application - Python, Streamlit - - Designed and built a no-code machine learning pipeline for stroke risk prediction using structured clinical data. - Performed data cleaning, feature engineering, and class imbalance handling to improve model robustness. - Built baseline models against optimized tree-based models, achieving measurable gains in predictive performance. - Deployed the trained model as a real-time inference web application using Streamlit, enabling interactive prediction on unseen data. - Simplified the project for reproducible deployment and future scalability. Conditional Image Generation (cGAN) - Python - - Implemented a Conditional Generative Adversarial Network to generate images conditioned on class labels. - Analyzed generator-discriminator training dynamics, convergence instability, and mode collapse behavior. - Evaluated output quality qualitatively and through loss-curve analysis to understand conditional generation effectiveness. - Gained hands-on experience with adversarial training and deep-learning optimization challenges. Masked Language Modeling - Python - - Implemented masked token prediction to study contextual representation learning in language models. - Built data preprocessing and masking pipelines to simulate retaining objectives used in transformer-based models.

Masked Language Modeling - Python - - Implemented masked token prediction to study contextual representation learning in language models. - Built data preprocessing and masking pipelines to simulate retaining objectives used in transformer-based models. - Evaluated prediction accuracy on masked tokens to understand language modeling behavior and limitations. Learning Management System - Python, Node.js, Docker - - Contributed to backend logic and frontend integration for a multi-user learning management platform. - Implemented basic authentication using Docker to enable consistent development and deployment environments. - Gained exposure to full-stack application flow and deployment considerations.
